name: Nera Competitions Seeder
author: Nera
upgrade_notice: Update for the latest demo competition seeder fixes and compatibility.

sections.description: Seeds representative WooCommerce lottery competition products for development and demos. Requires WooCommerce and supports Lottery for WooCommerce product data.
sections.installation: Install WooCommerce and Lottery for WooCommerce, then install and activate this plugin. Use Tools → Nera Competitions Seeder to seed or wipe demo competitions.
